content_fingerprint: chatgpt s new trusted contact feature can alert a close contact if safety concerns are detected openai has added an optional trusted contact feature to chatgpt that can notify a designated person when the system detects serious self harm concerns during a conversation openai on thursday introduced trusted contact a new optional safety feature within chatgpt that alerts a user designated close contact when the system detects serious self harm concerns during a chat session the feature is opt in and gives users control over who is notified and under what circumstances the announcement was publis
